mapper.select: SELECT id, course_code as courseCode, course_name as courseName, type as courseType, credits as credit, semester, status, create_time as createTime FROM info_course WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, course_code as courseCode, course_name as courseName, type as courseType, credits as credit, semester, status FROM info_course WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO info_course ( course_code, course_name, type, credits, semester, status, create_time, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{courseType}, #{credit}, #{semester}, 1, -- 默认开启状态 NOW(), 0 -- 逻辑删除标记：正常 )
mapper.update: UPDATE info_course SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
